tweet: shipped some updates. added suno-v5, flux-2-dev, and step-3.5-flash to the api. also wired up a cron job to auto-ban deleted github accounts and handle renamed users. more models, fewer ghost accounts.
alt_tweet: the api just got suno-v5, flux-2-dev, and step-3.5-flash. on the backend, we finally added a cron job to sync github identity changes and auto-ban deleted accounts. the spam mitigation will continue until the database is clean.
image_prompt: Dynamic pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor cap holding a broom, while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a pile of glitchy spam documents. In the background, three fresh code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. High contrast within the brand palette, energetic scroll-stopping composition.
reasoning: States exactly what was added and what was fixed. Uses dry humor to describe the spam cleanup. Lowercase, anti-hype, and respects the builder audience.
